# Location Template

> Copy the content below into `docs/locations/` to create a new location page.

---

```markdown
# [Location Name]

<NameBlock chinese="[中文名]" pinyin="[Pinyin]" english="[English Name]" />

## Overview

[Brief location introduction. Mark unconfirmed info as "To be verified".]

<LoreCard title="Geography" type="info">
[Geographic position, climate, terrain, and other details.]
</LoreCard>

## Classification

- World: [Which world it belongs to]
- Continent: [Which continent/region]
- Type: [Grotto-heaven / Blessed Land / City / Sect Headquarters / Other]

## Notable Figures

[Important characters associated with this location.]

## Related Events

[Major plot events that took place here.]

## Notes

- To be verified: [Unconfirmed information]
```
